alt_text: An L-shaped piece of plywood: a 90 cm by 60 cm rectangle with its top-right corner cut away. Labelled sides: bottom edge 90 cm, left edge 60 cm, top edge 50 cm, right edge 35 cm. The two unlabelled cut-out sides are the inner horizontal (90 - 50 = 40 cm) and the inner vertical (60 - 35 = 25 cm). Diagram not to scale.
